experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.summary: Led micro-frontend adoption and backend-for-frontend service for Lowe's Returns apps, boosting scalability and velocity.
bullets: Led the adoption of a micro-frontend architecture for the Lowe's Returns Android app, improving scalability and developer velocity.
Implemented new UX flows in React, Ionic, and Capacitor for the Returns Android application used by sales-floor associates.

Built and maintained a Node.js + Fastify Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) service powering the Returns Android and Web apps, including optimized REST APIs, request validation, and cross-service orchestration.

experiences.title: Full-stack Web Developer
experiences.summary: Delivered end-to-end web apps for startups and SMBs, sourcing clients via Upwork and leading full-stack development and deployment.
bullets: Delivered end-to-end web applications for startups and SMBs, sourcing clients through Upwork, covering scoping, architecture, full-stack development (Next.js, Node.js, Go), AWS deployment via custom CDKs, and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.

experiences.title: Front End Engineer
experiences.summary: Led frontend enhancements and cross-team collaboration for the AWS IAM Console, positively impacting thousands of customers.
bullets: Led implementation and launch of new React user experiences on the AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Console, impacting thousands of customers.
Participated in a monthly on-call rotation, resolving customer issues, triaging CloudWatch alarms, debugging service degradations, and collaborating with backend teams to restore service health.
Presented weekly operational status updates to the broader Identity organization.
Voluntarily left AWS to relocate closer to family in Chicago; was not affected by layoffs.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
experiences.summary: Contributed to frontend/backend development in a Dart + React-based web app and participated in Agile processes.
bullets: Contributed to development on a Dart + React-based web application (Wdesk).
Worked with Agile development methodologies. Participated in code review and wrote unit and integration tests.

experiences.title: Web Software Developer Intern
experiences.summary: Sole full-stack development on a data-logging web app and containerization for CI/CD.
bullets: Utilized a full stack (MongoDB, Express.js, Angular, Node.js) to develop an Audio Engineering discrepancy logger web application; was the sole developer on this project.
Used Docker to containerize the application for CI/CD.

awards.title: Technical Education Senior Award
awards.summary: Awarded to students who exhibited outstanding work and dedication in the area of Technical Education.

awards.title: WSC Logo Design
awards.summary: Won 1st place prize of $1,000 for a logo design competition hosted by the Wheaton Sport Center in Wheaton, IL.
bullets: Won 1st place prize of $1,000 for a logo design competition hosted by the Wheaton Sport Center in Wheaton, IL.
